step.name: collect-inputs
step.action: Gather namespace, name, visibility, license, stack.

step.name: draft-script
step.action: Render templates/bootstrap-script.sh with values; ensure idempotency guards.

step.name: dry-run
step.action: Run with `--dry-run` mode; print intended actions.

step.name: execute
step.decision-gate: If any step fails non-idempotently, halt; fix before continuing.

step.name: commit-script
step.action: Commit bootstrap.sh into the new repo; document re-run policy in AGENTS.md.
